tEn: Analyzing and Improving the Image Quality of StyleGAN
tZh: 分析并提升StyleGAN的图像质量
sEn: We analyze artifacts in StyleGAN and propose improvements to generator normalization, progressive growing, and regularization, achieving state-of-the-art unconditional image quality.
sZh: 我们分析了StyleGAN中的特征伪影，并提出了生成器归一化、渐进式增长和正则化方面的改进，实现了无条件图像生成的最先进质量。
absEn: The style-based GAN architecture (StyleGAN) yields state-of-the-art results in data-driven unconditional generative image modeling. We expose and analyze several of its characteristic artifacts, and propose changes in both model architecture and training methods to address them. In particular, we redesign the generator normalization, revisit progressive growing, and regularize the generator to encourage good conditioning in the mapping from latent codes to images. In addition to improving image quality, this path length regularizer yields the additional benefit that the generator becomes significantly easier to invert. This makes it possible to reliably attribute a generated image to a particular network. We furthermore visualize how well the generator utilizes its output resolution, and identify a capacity problem, motivating us to train larger models for additional quality improvements. Overall, our improved model redefines the state of the art in unconditional image modeling, both in terms of existing distribution quality metrics as well as perceived image quality.
absZh: 基于风格的生成对抗网络架构（StyleGAN）在数据驱动的无条件生成图像建模中取得了最先进的结果。我们揭示并分析了其若干特征伪影，并提出了模型架构和训练方法上的改进来解决这些问题。具体来说，我们重新设计了生成器归一化，重新审视了渐进式增长，并对生成器进行正则化以鼓励潜在代码到图像映射的良好条件。除了提高图像质量外，这种路径长度正则化还带来了额外的好处，即生成器变得更容易求逆。这使得能够可靠地将生成的图像归因于特定的网络。此外，我们可视化了生成器如何利用其输出分辨率，并识别出一个容量问题，促使我们训练更大的模型以进一步提高质量。总体而言，我们改进的模型在现有分布质量指标和感知图像质量方面重新定义了无条件图像建模的最先进水平。

contrib.en: Redesigns generator normalization to remove droplet artifacts via weight demodulation.
contrib.zh: 重新设计生成器归一化，通过权重解调去除水滴伪影。

contrib.en: Introduces path length regularizer to encourage smooth latent-to-image mapping, improving quality and invertibility.
contrib.zh: 引入路径长度正则化器，促进潜在空间到图像的平滑映射，提升质量和可逆性。

contrib.en: Replaces progressive growing with skip generator and residual discriminator, eliminating related artifacts.
contrib.zh: 用跳跃生成器和残差判别器替代渐进式增长，消除相关伪影。

contrib.en: Identifies capacity issue in high-resolution layers and increases feature maps to improve detail.
contrib.zh: 识别高分辨率层的容量问题，增加特征图以改善细节。

contrib.en: Proposes lazy regularization to reduce computational cost of regularizers without harming effectiveness.
contrib.zh: 提出惰性正则化，在不影响效果的前提下降低正则化器的计算成本。

contrib.en: Demonstrates improved source attribution via latent space projection with StyleGAN2.
contrib.zh: 通过StyleGAN2的潜在空间投影，展示改进的源归属能力。

limits.en: Path length regularizer introduces tradeoff between FID and PPL on less structured datasets.
limits.zh: 路径长度正则化器在结构较少的数据集上引入FID和PPL之间的权衡。

limits.en: Demodulation relies on statistical assumptions about signal, not actual feature map contents.
limits.zh: 解调依赖于信号的统计假设，而非实际特征图内容。

limits.en: FID and P&R metrics are biased towards texture over shape, potentially missing quality aspects.
limits.zh: FID和P&R指标偏向纹理而非形状，可能遗漏质量方面。

limits.en: Increased capacity leads to higher computational cost and training time.
limits.zh: 增加容量导致更高的计算成本和训练时间。

limits.en: Method still requires large datasets for training, limiting applicability in data-scarce scenarios.
limits.zh: 方法仍需大数据集训练，限制了在数据稀缺场景下的适用性。

items.en: The style-based GAN architecture (StyleGAN) yields state-of-the-art results in data-driven unconditional generative image modeling. We expose and analyze several of its characteristic artifacts, and propose changes in both model architecture and training methods to address them. In particular, we redesign the generator normalization, revisit progressive growing, and regularize the generator to encourage good conditioning in the mapping from latent codes to images. In addition to improving image quality, this path length regularizer yields the additional benefit that the generator becomes significantly easier to invert. This makes it possible to reliably attribute a generated image to a particular network. We furthermore visualize how well the generator utilizes its output resolution, and identify a capacity problem, motivating us to train larger models for additional quality improvements. Overall, our improved model redefines the state of the art in unconditional image modeling, both in terms of existing distribution quality metrics as well as perceived image quality.
items.zh: 基于风格的生成对抗网络架构（StyleGAN）在数据驱动的无条件生成图像建模中取得了最先进的结果。我们揭示并分析了其几个特征性伪影，并提出了模型架构和训练方法的改进以解决这些问题。具体来说，我们重新设计了生成器归一化，重新审视了渐进式增长，并对生成器进行正则化以鼓励从潜在编码到图像的映射具有良好的条件。除了提高图像质量外，这种路径长度正则化还带来了额外的好处，即生成器变得更容易求逆。这使得能够可靠地将生成的图像归因于特定的网络。此外，我们可视化了生成器如何利用其输出分辨率，并识别出一个容量问题，这促使我们训练更大的模型以进一步提高质量。总体而言，我们改进的模型重新定义了无条件图像建模的最先进水平，无论是在现有分布质量指标方面还是在感知图像质量方面。

items.en: The resolution and quality of images produced by generative methods, especially generative adversarial networks (GAN) [16], are improving rapidly [23, 31, 5]. The current state-of-the-art method for high-resolution image synthesis is StyleGAN [24], which has been shown to work reliably on a variety of datasets. Our work focuses on fixing its characteristic artifacts and improving the result quality further.
items.zh: 生成方法（尤其是生成对抗网络（GAN）[16]）生成的图像的分辨率和质量正在迅速提高[23, 31, 5]。当前用于高分辨率图像合成的最先进方法是StyleGAN [24]，它已被证明可以在各种数据集上可靠地工作。我们的工作侧重于修复其特征性伪影并进一步提高结果质量。

items.en: The distinguishing feature of StyleGAN [24] is its unconventional generator architecture. Instead of feeding the input latent code 𝐳∈𝒵𝐳𝒵{\bf z}\in\mathcal{Z} only to the beginning of a the network, the mapping network f𝑓f first transforms it to an intermediate latent code 𝐰∈𝒲𝐰𝒲{\bf w}\in\mathcal{W}. Affine transforms then produce styles that control the layers of the synthesis network g𝑔g via adaptive instance normalization (AdaIN) [21, 9, 13, 8]. Additionally, stochastic variation is facilitated by providing additional random noise maps to the synthesis network. It has been demonstrated [24, 38] that this design allows the intermediate latent space 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W} to be much less entangled than the input latent space 𝒵𝒵\mathcal{Z}. In this paper, we focus all analysis solely on 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W}, as it is the relevant latent space from the synthesis network’s point of view.
items.zh: StyleGAN [24] 的显著特征是其非传统的生成器架构。映射网络 f 不是将输入潜在编码 𝐳∈𝒵 仅输入到网络的开始，而是首先将其转换为中间潜在编码 𝐰∈𝒲。然后，仿射变换通过自适应实例归一化（AdaIN）[21, 9, 13, 8] 产生控制合成网络 g 各层的风格。此外，通过向合成网络提供额外的随机噪声图来促进随机变化。已有研究表明[24, 38]，这种设计使得中间潜在空间 𝒲 比输入潜在空间 𝒵 更少纠缠。在本文中，我们仅对 𝒲 进行分析，因为从合成网络的角度来看，它是相关的潜在空间。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Instance normalization causes water droplet -like artifacts in StyleGAN images. These are not always obvious in the generated images, but if we look at the activations inside the generator network, the problem is always there, in all feature maps starting from the 64x64 resolution. It is a systemic problem that plagues all StyleGAN images.
items.capZh: 图1：实例归一化导致StyleGAN图像中出现水滴状伪影。这些伪影在生成的图像中并不总是明显，但如果我们查看生成器网络内部的激活，问题始终存在，从64x64分辨率开始的所有特征图中都有。这是一个系统性问题，困扰着所有StyleGAN图像。

items.en: Many observers have noticed characteristic artifacts in images generated by StyleGAN [3]. We identify two causes for these artifacts, and describe changes in architecture and training methods that eliminate them. First, we investigate the origin of common blob-like artifacts, and find that the generator creates them to circumvent a design flaw in its architecture. In Section 2, we redesign the normalization used in the generator, which removes the artifacts. Second, we analyze artifacts related to progressive growing [23] that has been highly successful in stabilizing high-resolution GAN training. We propose an alternative design that achieves the same goal — training starts by focusing on low-resolution images and then progressively shifts focus to higher and higher resolutions — without changing the network topology during training. This new design also allows us to reason about the effective resolution of the generated images, which turns out to be lower than expected, motivating a capacity increase (Section 4).
items.zh: 许多观察者注意到StyleGAN [3] 生成的图像中存在特征性伪影。我们确定了这些伪影的两个原因，并描述了消除它们的架构和训练方法的改变。首先，我们调查了常见块状伪影的起源，发现生成器创建它们是为了规避其架构中的设计缺陷。在第2节中，我们重新设计了生成器中使用的归一化，从而消除了伪影。其次，我们分析了与渐进式增长[23]相关的伪影，渐进式增长在稳定高分辨率GAN训练方面非常成功。我们提出了一种替代设计，可以在不改变训练期间网络拓扑的情况下实现相同的目标——训练从关注低分辨率图像开始，然后逐渐将焦点转移到更高分辨率。这种新设计还使我们能够推理生成图像的有效分辨率，结果发现其低于预期，从而促使增加容量（第4节）。

items.en: Quantitative analysis of the quality of images produced using generative methods continues to be a challenging topic. Fréchet inception distance (FID) [20] measures differences in the density of two distributions in the high-dimensional feature space of an InceptionV3 classifier [39]. Precision and Recall (P&R) [36, 27] provide additional visibility by explicitly quantifying the percentage of generated images that are similar to training data and the percentage of training data that can be generated, respectively. We use these metrics to quantify the improvements.
items.zh: 对生成方法产生的图像质量进行定量分析仍然是一个具有挑战性的话题。Fréchet初始距离（FID）[20] 测量了InceptionV3分类器[39]高维特征空间中两个分布密度的差异。精确率和召回率（P&R）[36, 27] 通过明确量化与训练数据相似的生成图像百分比以及可以生成的训练数据百分比，提供了额外的可见性。我们使用这些指标来量化改进。

items.en: Both FID and P&R are based on classifier networks that have recently been shown to focus on textures rather than shapes [12], and consequently, the metrics do not accurately capture all aspects of image quality. We observe that the perceptual path length (PPL) metric [24], originally introduced as a method for estimating the quality of latent space interpolations, correlates with consistency and stability of shapes. Based on this, we regularize the synthesis network to favor smooth mappings (Section 3) and achieve a clear improvement in quality. To counter its computational expense, we also propose executing all regularizations less frequently, observing that this can be done without compromising effectiveness.
items.zh: FID和P&R都基于分类器网络，最近的研究表明这些网络关注纹理而非形状[12]，因此这些指标不能准确捕捉图像质量的所有方面。我们观察到感知路径长度（PPL）指标[24]（最初作为估计潜在空间插值质量的方法引入）与形状的一致性和稳定性相关。基于此，我们对合成网络进行正则化以支持平滑映射（第3节），并实现了质量的明显改进。为了应对其计算开销，我们还建议降低所有正则化的执行频率，并观察到这可以在不影响效果的情况下进行。

items.en: Finally, we find that projection of images to the latent space 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W} works significantly better with the new, path-length regularized StyleGAN2 generator than with the original StyleGAN. This makes it easier to attribute a generated image to its source (Section 5).
items.zh: 最后，我们发现，使用新的、路径长度正则化的StyleGAN2生成器将图像投影到潜在空间 𝒲 的效果明显优于原始StyleGAN。这使得更容易将生成的图像归因于其来源（第5节）。

items.en: Our implementation and trained models are available at https://github.com/NVlabs/stylegan2
items.zh: 我们的实现和训练模型可在 https://github.com/NVlabs/stylegan2 获取。

items.capEn: Figure 2: We redesign the architecture of the StyleGAN synthesis network. (a) The original StyleGAN, where A denotes a learned affine transform from 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W} that produces a style and B is a noise broadcast operation. (b) The same diagram with full detail. Here we have broken the AdaIN to explicit normalization followed by modulation, both operating on the mean and standard deviation per feature map. We have also annotated the learned weights (w𝑤w), biases (b)b), and constant input (c𝑐c), and redrawn the gray boxes so that one style is active per box. The activation function (leaky ReLU) is always applied right after adding the bias. (c) We make several changes to the original architecture that are justified in the main text. We remove some redundant operations at the beginning, move the addition of b𝑏b and B to be outside active area of a style, and adjust only the standard deviation per feature map. (d) The revised architecture enables us to replace instance normalization with a “demodulation” operation, which we apply to the weights associated with each convolution layer.
items.capZh: 图2：我们重新设计了StyleGAN合成网络的架构。(a) 原始StyleGAN，其中A表示从 𝒲 学习到的仿射变换，产生风格，B是噪声广播操作。(b) 相同图表的详细版本。这里我们将AdaIN分解为显式归一化后接调制，两者均作用于每个特征图的均值和标准差。我们还标注了学习到的权重（w）、偏置（b）和常数输入（c），并重新绘制了灰色框，使得每个框内有一个风格处于活动状态。激活函数（leaky ReLU）始终在添加偏置后立即应用。(c) 我们对原始架构进行了几处更改，这些更改在正文中得到了证明。我们移除了一些开始处的冗余操作，将b和B的添加移出风格的活动区域，并仅调整每个特征图的标准差。(d) 修订后的架构使我们能够用“解调”操作替换实例归一化，该操作应用于与每个卷积层相关的权重。

items.en: We begin by observing that most images generated by StyleGAN exhibit characteristic blob-shaped artifacts that resemble water droplets. As shown in Figure 1, even when the droplet may not be obvious in the final image, it is present in the intermediate feature maps of the generator.111In rare cases (perhaps 0.1% of images) the droplet is missing, leading to severely corrupted images. See Appendix A for details. The anomaly starts to appear around 64×\times64 resolution, is present in all feature maps, and becomes progressively stronger at higher resolutions. The existence of such a consistent artifact is puzzling, as the discriminator should be able to detect it.
items.zh: 我们首先观察到，大多数StyleGAN生成的图像表现出特征性的块状伪影，类似于水滴。如图1所示，即使水滴在最终图像中可能不明显，它在生成器的中间特征图中也存在。111在极少数情况下（可能占图像的0.1%），水滴缺失，导致图像严重损坏。详见附录A。异常大约在64×64分辨率时开始出现，存在于所有特征图中，并在更高分辨率下逐渐增强。这种一致伪影的存在令人费解，因为判别器应该能够检测到它。

items.en: We pinpoint the problem to the AdaIN operation that normalizes the mean and variance of each feature map separately, thereby potentially destroying any information found in the magnitudes of the features relative to each other. We hypothesize that the droplet artifact is a result of the generator intentionally sneaking signal strength information past instance normalization: by creating a strong, localized spike that dominates the statistics, the generator can effectively scale the signal as it likes elsewhere. Our hypothesis is supported by the finding that when the normalization step is removed from the generator, as detailed below, the droplet artifacts disappear completely.
items.zh: 我们将问题定位到AdaIN操作，该操作分别归一化每个特征图的均值和方差，从而可能破坏特征相对幅度中的任何信息。我们假设水滴伪影是生成器故意通过实例归一化偷偷传递信号强度信息的结果：通过创建一个强大的、局部化的尖峰来主导统计量，生成器可以有效地在其他地方按需缩放信号。我们的假设得到以下发现的支持：当从生成器中移除归一化步骤时（如下详述），水滴伪影完全消失。

items.en: We will first revise several details of the StyleGAN generator to better facilitate our redesigned normalization. These changes have either a neutral or small positive effect on their own in terms of quality metrics.
items.zh: 我们将首先修订StyleGAN生成器的几个细节，以更好地促进我们重新设计的归一化。这些更改本身在质量指标方面具有中性或小的积极影响。

items.en: One of the main strengths of StyleGAN is the ability to control the generated images via style mixing, i.e., by feeding a different latent 𝐰𝐰{\bf w} to different layers at inference time. In practice, style modulation may amplify certain feature maps by an order of magnitude or more. For style mixing to work, we must explicitly counteract this amplification on a per-sample basis — otherwise the subsequent layers would not be able to operate on the data in a meaningful way.
items.zh: StyleGAN的主要优势之一是通过风格混合控制生成图像的能力，即在推理时向不同层提供不同的潜在 𝐰。在实践中，风格调制可能会将某些特征图放大一个数量级或更多。为了使风格混合工作，我们必须基于每个样本明确抵消这种放大——否则后续层将无法以有意义的方式处理数据。

items.en: If we were willing to sacrifice scale-specific controls (see video), we could simply remove the normalization, thus removing the artifacts and also improving FID slightly [27]. We will now propose a better alternative that removes the artifacts while retaining full controllability. The main idea is to base normalization on the expected statistics of the incoming feature maps, but without explicit forcing.
items.zh: 如果我们愿意牺牲特定尺度的控制（见视频），我们可以简单地移除归一化，从而消除伪影并略微改善FID [27]。我们现在将提出一个更好的替代方案，在消除伪影的同时保持完全可控性。主要思想是基于传入特征图的期望统计量进行归一化，但不进行显式强制。

items.en: Recall that a style block in Figure 2c consists of modulation, convolution, and normalization. Let us start by considering the effect of a modulation followed by a convolution. The modulation scales each input feature map of the convolution based on the incoming style, which can alternatively be implemented by scaling the convolution weights:
items.zh: 回想一下，图2c中的风格块由调制、卷积和归一化组成。让我们首先考虑调制后接卷积的效果。调制根据传入的风格缩放卷积的每个输入特征图，这也可以通过缩放卷积权重来实现：

items.en: where w𝑤w and w′superscript𝑤′w^{\prime} are the original and modulated weights, respectively, sisubscript𝑠𝑖s_{i} is the scale corresponding to the i𝑖ith input feature map, and j𝑗j and k𝑘k enumerate the output feature maps and spatial footprint of the convolution, respectively.
items.zh: 其中 w 和 w' 分别是原始权重和调制后的权重，s_i 是对应于第 i 个输入特征图的缩放因子，j 和 k 分别枚举卷积的输出特征图和空间足迹。

items.en: Now, the purpose of instance normalization is to essentially remove the effect of s𝑠s from the statistics of the convolution’s output feature maps. We observe that this goal can be achieved more directly. Let us assume that the input activations are i.i.d. random variables with unit standard deviation. After modulation and convolution, the output activations have standard deviation of
items.zh: 现在，实例归一化的目的是本质上从卷积输出特征图的统计量中移除 s 的影响。我们观察到，这个目标可以更直接地实现。假设输入激活是独立同分布的随机变量，具有单位标准差。经过调制和卷积后，输出激活的标准差为

items.en: i.e., the outputs are scaled by the L2subscript𝐿2L_{2} norm of the corresponding weights. The subsequent normalization aims to restore the outputs back to unit standard deviation. Based on Equation 2, this is achieved if we scale (“demodulate”) each output feature map j𝑗j by 1/σj1subscript𝜎𝑗1/\sigma_{j}. Alternatively, we can again bake this into the convolution weights:
items.zh: 即，输出被相应权重的 L2 范数缩放。随后的归一化旨在将输出恢复为单位标准差。基于公式2，如果我们将每个输出特征图 j 按 1/σ_j 缩放（“解调”），则可以实现这一点。或者，我们可以再次将其融入卷积权重中：

items.en: where ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon is a small constant to avoid numerical issues.
items.zh: 其中 ϵ 是一个小常数，以避免数值问题。

items.en: We have now baked the entire style block to a single convolution layer whose weights are adjusted based on s𝑠s using Equations 1 and 3 (Figure 2d). Compared to instance normalization, our demodulation technique is weaker because it is based on statistical assumptions about the signal instead of actual contents of the feature maps. Similar statistical analysis has been extensively used in modern network initializers [14, 19], but we are not aware of it being previously used as a replacement for data-dependent normalization. Our demodulation is also related to weight normalization [37] that performs the same calculation as a part of reparameterizing the weight tensor. Prior work has identified weight normalization as beneficial in the context of GAN training [43].
items.zh: 我们现在已将整个风格块整合到一个单一的卷积层中，其权重根据 s 使用公式 1 和 3 进行调整（图 2d）。与实例归一化相比，我们的解调技术较弱，因为它基于对信号的统计假设，而非特征图的实际内容。类似的统计分析已广泛用于现代网络初始化器 [14, 19]，但我们未发现其先前被用作数据相关归一化的替代方案。我们的解调也与权重归一化 [37] 相关，后者执行相同的计算作为权重张量重新参数化的一部分。先前工作已指出权重归一化在 GAN 训练中的益处 [43]。

items.en: Our new design removes the characteristic artifacts (Figure 3) while retaining full controllability, as demonstrated in the accompanying video. FID remains largely unaffected (Table 1, rows a, b), but there is a notable shift from precision to recall. We argue that this is generally desirable, since recall can be traded into precision via truncation, whereas the opposite is not true [27]. In practice our design can be implemented efficiently using grouped convolutions, as detailed in Appendix B. To avoid having to account for the activation function in Equation 3, we scale our activation functions so that they retain the expected signal variance.
items.zh: 我们的新设计移除了特征性伪影（图 3），同时保持了完全可控性，如随附视频所示。FID 基本不受影响（表 1，行 a、b），但存在从精确率到召回率的显著转变。我们认为这通常是可取的，因为召回率可通过截断转换为精确率，反之则不然 [27]。在实践中，我们的设计可使用分组卷积高效实现，详见附录 B。为避免在公式 3 中考虑激活函数，我们缩放激活函数以保持预期的信号方差。

full.secZh: 3 图像质量与生成器平滑性

items.capEn: Figure 3: Replacing normalization with demodulation removes the characteristic artifacts from images and activations.
items.capZh: 图 3：用解调替换归一化可移除图像和激活中的特征性伪影。

items.en: While GAN metrics such as FID or Precision and Recall (P&R) successfully capture many aspects of the generator, they continue to have somewhat of a blind spot for image quality. For an example, refer to Figures 13 and 14 that contrast generators with identical FID and P&R scores but markedly different overall quality.222We believe that the key to the apparent inconsistency lies in the particular choice of feature space rather than the foundations of FID or P&R. It was recently discovered that classifiers trained using ImageNet [35] tend to base their decisions much more on texture than shape [12], while humans strongly focus on shape [28]. This is relevant in our context because FID and P&R use high-level features from InceptionV3 [39] and VGG-16 [39], respectively, which were trained in this way and are thus expected to be biased towards texture detection. As such, images with, e.g., strong cat textures may appear more similar to each other than a human observer would agree, thus partially compromising density-based metrics (FID) and manifold coverage metrics (P&R).
items.zh: 尽管 GAN 指标如 FID 或精确率与召回率（P&R）成功捕捉了生成器的许多方面，但它们对图像质量仍存在一定盲点。例如，参考图 13 和 14，对比具有相同 FID 和 P&R 分数但整体质量显著不同的生成器。222我们认为这种明显不一致的关键在于特征空间的特定选择，而非 FID 或 P&R 的基础。最近发现，使用 ImageNet [35] 训练的分类器更倾向于基于纹理而非形状做出决策 [12]，而人类则强烈关注形状 [28]。这在我们上下文中相关，因为 FID 和 P&R 分别使用 InceptionV3 [39] 和 VGG-16 [39] 的高级特征，这些特征以这种方式训练，因此预期偏向纹理检测。因此，例如具有强烈猫纹理的图像可能比人类观察者认为的更相似，从而部分损害了基于密度的指标（FID）和流形覆盖指标（P&R）。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Connection between perceptual path length and image quality using baseline StyleGAN (config a) with LSUN Cat. (a) Random examples with low PPL (≤10thabsentsuperscript10th\leq 10^{\mathrm{th}} percentile). (b) Examples with high PPL (≥90thabsentsuperscript90th\geq 90^{\mathrm{th}} percentile). There is a clear correlation between PPL scores and semantic consistency of the images.
items.capZh: 图 4：使用基线 StyleGAN（配置 a）与 LSUN Cat 的感知路径长度与图像质量之间的关系。(a) 低 PPL（≤10^{th} 百分位）的随机示例。(b) 高 PPL（≥90^{th} 百分位）的示例。PPL 分数与图像的语义一致性之间存在明显相关性。

items.capEn: Figure 5: (a) Distribution of PPL scores of individual images generated using baseline StyleGAN (config a) with LSUN Cat (FID = 8.53, PPL = 924). The percentile ranges corresponding to Figure 4 are highlighted in orange. (b) StyleGAN2 (config f) improves the PPL distribution considerably (showing a snapshot with the same FID = 8.53, PPL = 387).
items.capZh: 图 5：(a) 使用基线 StyleGAN（配置 a）与 LSUN Cat（FID = 8.53，PPL = 924）生成的单个图像的 PPL 分数分布。对应于图 4 的百分位范围以橙色突出显示。(b) StyleGAN2（配置 f）显著改善了 PPL 分布（显示相同 FID = 8.53，PPL = 387 的快照）。

items.en: We observe a correlation between perceived image quality and perceptual path length (PPL) [24], a metric that was originally introduced for quantifying the smoothness of the mapping from a latent space to the output image by measuring average LPIPS distances [50] between generated images under small perturbations in latent space. Again consulting Figures 13 and 14, a smaller PPL (smoother generator mapping) appears to correlate with higher overall image quality, whereas other metrics are blind to the change. Figure 4 examines this correlation more closely through per-image PPL scores on LSUN Cat, computed by sampling the latent space around 𝐰∼f​(𝐳)similar-to𝐰𝑓𝐳{\bf w}\sim f(\mathbf{z}). Low scores are indeed indicative of high-quality images, and vice versa. Figure 5a shows the corresponding histogram and reveals the long tail of the distribution. The overall PPL for the model is simply the expected value of these per-image PPL scores. We always compute PPL for the entire image, as opposed to Karras et al. [24] who use a smaller central crop.
items.zh: 我们观察到感知图像质量与感知路径长度（PPL）[24] 之间存在相关性，该指标最初用于通过测量潜在空间中小扰动下生成图像之间的平均 LPIPS 距离 [50] 来量化从潜在空间到输出图像的映射平滑度。再次参考图 13 和 14，较小的 PPL（更平滑的生成器映射）似乎与更高的整体图像质量相关，而其他指标对此变化不敏感。图 4 通过 LSUN Cat 上的每图像 PPL 分数更仔细地检查了这种相关性，通过采样 w∼f(z) 周围的潜在空间计算。低分数确实表明高质量图像，反之亦然。图 5a 显示了相应的直方图，并揭示了分布的拖尾。模型的整体 PPL 就是这些每图像 PPL 分数的期望值。我们始终计算整个图像的 PPL，与 Karras 等人 [24] 使用较小的中心裁剪不同。

items.en: It is not immediately obvious why a low PPL should correlate with image quality. We hypothesize that during training, as the discriminator penalizes broken images, the most direct way for the generator to improve is to effectively stretch the region of latent space that yields good images. This would lead to the low-quality images being squeezed into small latent space regions of rapid change. While this improves the average output quality in the short term, the accumulating distortions impair the training dynamics and consequently the final image quality.
items.zh: 低 PPL 为何应与图像质量相关并不显而易见。我们假设在训练过程中，随着判别器惩罚破损图像，生成器改进的最直接方式是有效拉伸产生良好图像的潜在空间区域。这将导致低质量图像被压缩到快速变化的潜在空间小区域。虽然这短期内提高了平均输出质量，但累积的失真损害了训练动态，从而最终影响图像质量。

items.en: Clearly, we cannot simply encourage minimal PPL since that would guide the generator toward a degenerate solution with zero recall. Instead, we will describe a new regularizer that aims for a smoother generator mapping without this drawback. As the resulting regularization term is somewhat expensive to compute, we first describe a general optimization that applies to any regularization technique.
items.zh: 显然，我们不能简单地鼓励最小 PPL，因为那将引导生成器走向召回率为零的退化解。相反，我们将描述一种新的正则化器，旨在实现更平滑的生成器映射而无此缺点。由于所得正则化项计算成本较高，我们首先描述一种适用于任何正则化技术的通用优化方法。

items.en: Typically the main loss function (e.g., logistic loss [16]) and regularization terms (e.g., R1subscript𝑅1R_{1} [30]) are written as a single expression and are thus optimized simultaneously. We observe that the regularization terms can be computed less frequently than the main loss function, thus greatly diminishing their computational cost and the overall memory usage. Table 1, row c shows that no harm is caused when R1subscript𝑅1R_{1} regularization is performed only once every 16 minibatches, and we adopt the same strategy for our new regularizer as well. Appendix B gives implementation details.
items.zh: 通常，主损失函数（例如，逻辑损失 [16]）和正则化项（例如，R1 [30]）被写为单个表达式并同时优化。我们观察到正则化项的计算频率可以低于主损失函数，从而大大降低其计算成本和整体内存使用。表 1，行 c 显示当 R1 正则化每 16 个小批量仅执行一次时未造成损害，我们对新正则化器也采用相同策略。附录 B 给出了实现细节。

items.en: We would like to encourage that a fixed-size step in 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W} results in a non-zero, fixed-magnitude change in the image. We can measure the deviation from this ideal empirically by stepping into random directions in the image space and observing the corresponding 𝐰𝐰{\bf w} gradients. These gradients should have close to an equal length regardless of 𝐰𝐰{\bf w} or the image-space direction, indicating that the mapping from the latent space to image space is well-conditioned [33].
items.zh: 我们希望鼓励 W 中的固定步长导致图像中非零、固定幅度的变化。我们可以通过向图像空间中的随机方向步进并观察相应的 w 梯度来经验性地测量与这一理想的偏差。这些梯度应具有接近相等的长度，无论 w 或图像空间方向如何，表明从潜在空间到图像空间的映射是良态的 [33]。

items.en: At a single 𝐰∈𝒲𝐰𝒲{\bf w}\in\mathcal{W}, the local metric scaling properties of the generator mapping g​(𝐰):𝒲↦𝒴:𝑔𝐰maps-to𝒲𝒴g({\bf w}):\mathcal{W}\mapsto\mathcal{Y} are captured by the Jacobian matrix 𝐉𝐰=∂g​(𝐰)/∂𝐰subscript𝐉𝐰𝑔𝐰𝐰\mathbf{J}_{\bf w}={\partial g({\bf w})}/{\partial{\bf w}}. Motivated by the desire to preserve the expected lengths of vectors regardless of the direction, we formulate our regularizer as
items.zh: 在单个 w∈W 处，生成器映射 g(w):W↦Y 的局部度量缩放特性由雅可比矩阵 J_w=∂g(w)/∂w 捕获。出于保持向量期望长度与方向无关的动机，我们将正则化器公式化为

items.en: where 𝐲𝐲{\bf y} are random images with normally distributed pixel intensities, and 𝐰∼f​(𝐳)similar-to𝐰𝑓𝐳{\bf w}\sim f(\mathbf{z}), where 𝐳𝐳\mathbf{z} are normally distributed. We show in Appendix C that, in high dimensions, this prior is minimized when 𝐉𝐰subscript𝐉𝐰\mathbf{J}_{\bf w} is orthogonal (up to a global scale) at any 𝐰𝐰{\bf w}. An orthogonal matrix preserves lengths and introduces no squeezing along any dimension.
items.zh: 其中 y 是像素强度正态分布的随机图像，w∼f(z)，其中 z 正态分布。我们在附录 C 中表明，在高维中，当 J_w 在任何 w 处正交（直至全局尺度）时，该先验最小化。正交矩阵保持长度，且不沿任何维度引入挤压。

items.en: To avoid explicit computation of the Jacobian matrix, we use the identity 𝐉𝐰T​𝐲=∇𝐰(g​(𝐰)⋅𝐲)subscriptsuperscript𝐉𝑇𝐰𝐲subscript∇𝐰⋅𝑔𝐰𝐲{\bf J}^{T}_{\bf w}{\bf y}=\nabla_{\bf w}(g({\bf w})\cdot{\bf y}), which is efficiently computable using standard backpropagation [6]. The constant a𝑎a is set dynamically during optimization as the long-running exponential moving average of the lengths ∥𝐉𝐰T​𝐲∥2subscriptdelimited-∥∥subscriptsuperscript𝐉𝑇𝐰𝐲2\lVert{\bf J}^{T}_{\bf w}{\bf y}\rVert_{2}, allowing the optimization to find a suitable global scale by itself.
items.zh: 为避免显式计算雅可比矩阵，我们使用恒等式 J_w^T y = ∇_w(g(w)·y)，该式可使用标准反向传播高效计算 [6]。常数 a 在优化过程中动态设置为长度 ∥J_w^T y∥_2 的长期指数移动平均，允许优化自行找到合适的全局尺度。

items.en: Our regularizer is closely related to the Jacobian clamping regularizer presented by Odena et al. [33]. Practical differences include that we compute the products 𝐉𝐰T​𝐲subscriptsuperscript𝐉𝑇𝐰𝐲{\bf J}^{T}_{\bf w}{\bf y} analytically whereas they use finite differences for estimating 𝐉𝐰​𝜹subscript𝐉𝐰𝜹\mathbf{J}_{\bf w}\boldsymbol{\delta} with 𝒵∋𝜹∼𝒩​(0,𝐈)contains𝒵𝜹similar-to𝒩0𝐈\mathcal{Z}\ni\boldsymbol{\delta}\sim\mathcal{N}(0,\mathbf{I}). It should be noted that spectral normalization [31] of the generator [46] only constrains the largest singular value, posing no constraints on the others and hence not necessarily leading to better conditioning. We find that enabling spectral normalization in addition to our contributions — or instead of them — invariably compromises FID, as detailed in Appendix E.
items.zh: 我们的正则化器与 Odena 等人 [33] 提出的雅可比钳位正则化器密切相关。实际差异包括我们解析计算乘积 J_w^T y，而他们使用有限差分估计 J_w δ，其中 Z∋δ∼N(0,I)。应注意，生成器 [46] 的谱归一化 [31] 仅约束最大奇异值，对其他奇异值无约束，因此不一定导致更好的条件。我们发现，在我们的贡献之外或替代它们启用谱归一化总是损害 FID，详见附录 E。

items.en: In practice, we notice that path length regularization leads to more reliable and consistently behaving models, making architecture exploration easier. We also observe that the smoother generator is significantly easier to invert (Section 5). Figure 5b shows that path length regularization clearly tightens the distribution of per-image PPL scores, without pushing the mode to zero. However, Table 1, row d points toward a tradeoff between FID and PPL in datasets that are less structured than FFHQ.
items.zh: 在实践中，我们注意到路径长度正则化导致更可靠且行为一致的模型，使架构探索更容易。我们还观察到更平滑的生成器显著更易于求逆（第 5 节）。图 5b 显示路径长度正则化明显收紧每图像 PPL 分数的分布，而不将模式推向零。然而，表 1，行 d 指出在结构化程度低于 FFHQ 的数据集上，FID 和 PPL 之间存在权衡。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Progressive growing leads to “phase” artifacts. In this example the teeth do not follow the pose but stay aligned to the camera, as indicated by the blue line.
items.capZh: 图 6：渐进式生长导致“相位”伪影。在此示例中，牙齿不跟随姿态而是保持与相机对齐，如蓝线所示。

items.en: Progressive growing [23] has been very successful in stabilizing high-resolution image synthesis, but it causes its own characteristic artifacts. The key issue is that the progressively grown generator appears to have a strong location preference for details; the accompanying video shows that when features like teeth or eyes should move smoothly over the image, they may instead remain stuck in place before jumping to the next preferred location. Figure 6 shows a related artifact. We believe the problem is that in progressive growing each resolution serves momentarily as the output resolution, forcing it to generate maximal frequency details, which then leads to the trained network to have excessively high frequencies in the intermediate layers, compromising shift invariance [49]. Appendix A shows an example. These issues prompt us to search for an alternative formulation that would retain the benefits of progressive growing without the drawbacks.
items.zh: 渐进式生长 [23] 在稳定高分辨率图像合成方面非常成功，但它会导致其特有的伪影。关键问题在于渐进式生长的生成器似乎对细节有强烈的位置偏好；随附视频显示，当牙齿或眼睛等特征应在图像上平滑移动时，它们可能反而停留在原地，然后跳转到下一个偏好位置。图 6 显示了一个相关伪影。我们认为问题在于渐进式生长中每个分辨率暂时充当输出分辨率，迫使其生成最大频率细节，从而导致训练后的网络在中间层具有过高的频率，损害平移不变性 [49]。附录 A 显示了一个示例。这些问题促使我们寻找一种替代公式，以保留渐进式生长的优点而无缺点。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Three generator (above the dashed line) and discriminator architectures. Up and Down denote bilinear up and downsampling, respectively. In residual networks these also include 1×\times1 convolutions to adjust the number of feature maps. tRGB and fRGB convert between RGB and high-dimensional per-pixel data. Architectures used in configs e and f are shown in green.
items.capZh: 图 7：三种生成器（虚线以上）和判别器架构。Up 和 Down 分别表示双线性上采样和下采样。在残差网络中，它们还包括 1×1 卷积以调整特征图数量。tRGB 和 fRGB 在 RGB 和高维逐像素数据之间转换。配置 e 和 f 中使用的架构以绿色显示。

items.en: While StyleGAN uses simple feedforward designs in the generator (synthesis network) and discriminator, there is a vast body of work dedicated to the study of better network architectures. Skip connections [34, 22], residual networks [18, 17, 31], and hierarchical methods [7, 47, 48] have proven highly successful also in the context of generative methods. As such, we decided to re-evaluate the network design of StyleGAN and search for an architecture that produces high-quality images without progressive growing.
items.zh: 虽然 StyleGAN 在生成器（合成网络）和判别器中使用简单的前馈设计，但有大量工作致力于研究更好的网络架构。跳跃连接 [34, 22]、残差网络 [18, 17, 31] 和层次方法 [7, 47, 48] 在生成方法中也已被证明非常成功。因此，我们决定重新评估 StyleGAN 的网络设计，并寻找一种无需渐进式生长即可生成高质量图像的架构。

items.en: For the rest of the paper we use a skip generator and a residual discriminator, without progressive growing. This corresponds to configuration e in Table 1, and it significantly improves FID and PPL.
items.zh: 在本文的其余部分，我们使用跳跃生成器和残差判别器，而不采用渐进式增长。这对应于表1中的配置e，并且显著改善了FID和PPL。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Contribution of each resolution to the output of the generator as a function of training time. The vertical axis shows a breakdown of the relative standard deviations of different resolutions, and the horizontal axis corresponds to training progress, measured in millions of training images shown to the discriminator. We can see that in the beginning the network focuses on low-resolution images and progressively shifts its focus on larger resolutions as training progresses. In (a) the generator basically outputs a 5122superscript5122512^{2} image with some minor sharpening for 10242superscript102421024^{2}, while in (b) the larger network focuses more on the high-resolution details.
items.capZh: 图8：训练过程中每个分辨率对生成器输出的贡献。纵轴显示不同分辨率的相对标准差分解，横轴对应训练进度（以显示给判别器的训练图像百万数衡量）。我们可以看到，在开始时网络专注于低分辨率图像，并随着训练进展逐渐将焦点转移到更高分辨率。在(a)中，生成器基本上输出一个512²图像，并对1024²进行一些微小的锐化，而在(b)中，更大的网络更关注高分辨率细节。

items.en: The key aspect of progressive growing, which we would like to preserve, is that the generator will initially focus on low-resolution features and then slowly shift its attention to finer details. The architectures in Figure 7 make it possible for the generator to first output low resolution images that are not affected by the higher-resolution layers in a significant way, and later shift the focus to the higher-resolution layers as the training proceeds. Since this is not enforced in any way, the generator will do it only if it is beneficial. To analyze the behavior in practice, we need to quantify how strongly the generator relies on particular resolutions over the course of training.
items.zh: 渐进式增长的关键方面（我们希望保留）是生成器最初专注于低分辨率特征，然后慢慢将注意力转移到更精细的细节上。图7中的架构使得生成器能够首先输出低分辨率图像，这些图像不会受到高分辨率层的显著影响，然后随着训练的进行将焦点转移到高分辨率层。由于这并非强制性的，生成器只会在有益的情况下这样做。为了分析实际行为，我们需要量化生成器在训练过程中对特定分辨率的依赖程度。

items.en: Since the skip generator (Figure 7b) forms the image by explicitly summing RGB values from multiple resolutions, we can estimate the relative importance of the corresponding layers by measuring how much they contribute to the final image. In Figure 8a, we plot the standard deviation of the pixel values produced by each tRGB layer as a function of training time. We calculate the standard deviations over 1024 random samples of 𝐰𝐰{\bf w} and normalize the values so that they sum to 100%.
items.zh: 由于跳跃生成器（图7b）通过显式求和来自多个分辨率的RGB值来形成图像，我们可以通过测量它们对最终图像的贡献程度来估计相应层的相对重要性。在图8a中，我们绘制了每个tRGB层产生的像素值的标准差随训练时间的变化。我们计算了1024个随机𝐰样本的标准差，并将值归一化，使其总和为100%。

items.en: At the start of training, we can see that the new skip generator behaves similar to progressive growing — now achieved without changing the network topology. It would thus be reasonable to expect the highest resolution to dominate towards the end of the training. The plot, however, shows that this fails to happen in practice, which indicates that the generator may not be able to “fully utilize” the target resolution. To verify this, we inspected the generated images manually and noticed that they generally lack some of the pixel-level detail that is present in the training data — the images could be described as being sharpened versions of 5122superscript5122512^{2} images instead of true 10242superscript102421024^{2} images.
items.zh: 在训练开始时，我们可以看到新的跳跃生成器的行为类似于渐进式增长——现在无需改变网络拓扑即可实现。因此，可以合理预期最高分辨率在训练结束时占主导地位。然而，该图显示这在实践中并未发生，这表明生成器可能无法“充分利用”目标分辨率。为了验证这一点，我们手动检查了生成的图像，并注意到它们通常缺乏训练数据中存在的一些像素级细节——这些图像可以被描述为512²图像的锐化版本，而不是真正的1024²图像。

items.en: This leads us to hypothesize that there is a capacity problem in our networks, which we test by doubling the number of feature maps in the highest-resolution layers of both networks.444We double the number of feature maps in resolutions 642superscript64264^{2}–10242superscript102421024^{2} while keeping other parts of the networks unchanged. This increases the total number of trainable parameters in the generator by 22% (25M →→\rightarrow 30M) and in the discriminator by 21% (24M →→\rightarrow 29M). This brings the behavior more in line with expectations: Figure 8b shows a significant increase in the contribution of the highest-resolution layers, and Table 1, row f shows that FID and Recall improve markedly. The last row shows that baseline StyleGAN also benefits from additional capacity, but its quality remains far below StyleGAN2.
items.zh: 这使我们假设我们的网络存在容量问题，我们通过将两个网络最高分辨率层的特征图数量加倍来测试这一点。⁴⁴我们将分辨率64²–1024²的特征图数量加倍，同时保持网络的其他部分不变。这使得生成器中的可训练参数总数增加了22%（25M → 30M），判别器增加了21%（24M → 29M）。这使得行为更符合预期：图8b显示最高分辨率层的贡献显著增加，表1第f行显示FID和Recall显著改善。最后一行显示基线StyleGAN也受益于额外的容量，但其质量仍远低于StyleGAN2。

full.sec: 5 Projection of images to latent space
full.secZh: 5 图像到潜在空间的投影

items.en: Inverting the synthesis network g𝑔g is an interesting problem that has many applications. Manipulating a given image in the latent feature space requires finding a matching latent code 𝐰𝐰{\bf w} for it first. Previous research [1, 10] suggests that instead of finding a common latent code 𝐰𝐰{\bf w}, the results improve if a separate 𝐰𝐰{\bf w} is chosen for each layer of the generator. The same approach was used in an early encoder implementation [32]. While extending the latent space in this fashion finds a closer match to a given image, it also enables projecting arbitrary images that should have no latent representation. Instead, we concentrate on finding latent codes in the original, unextended latent space, as these correspond to images that the generator could have produced.
items.zh: 反转合成网络g是一个有趣的问题，具有许多应用。在潜在特征空间中操作给定图像需要首先为其找到匹配的潜在代码𝐰。先前的研究[1, 10]表明，与其寻找一个共同的潜在代码𝐰，不如为生成器的每一层选择单独的𝐰，结果会更好。早期编码器实现[32]也使用了相同的方法。虽然以这种方式扩展潜在空间可以找到与给定图像更接近的匹配，但它也使得能够投影本应没有潜在表示的任意图像。相反，我们专注于在原始的、未扩展的潜在空间中寻找潜在代码，因为这些代码对应于生成器可能生成的图像。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Example images and their projected and re-synthesized counterparts. For each configuration, top row shows the target images and bottom row shows the synthesis of the corresponding projected latent vector and noise inputs. With the baseline StyleGAN, projection often finds a reasonably close match for generated images, but especially the backgrounds differ from the originals. The images generated using StyleGAN2 can be projected almost perfectly back into generator inputs, while projected real images (from the training set) show clear differences to the originals, as expected. All tests were done using the same projection method and hyperparameters.
items.capZh: 图9：示例图像及其投影和重新合成后的对应图像。对于每种配置，顶行显示目标图像，底行显示相应投影潜在向量和噪声输入的合成结果。使用基线StyleGAN时，投影通常能为生成的图像找到相当接近的匹配，但尤其是背景与原始图像不同。使用StyleGAN2生成的图像几乎可以完美地投影回生成器输入，而投影的真实图像（来自训练集）与原始图像存在明显差异，正如预期。所有测试均使用相同的投影方法和超参数。

items.capEn: Figure 10: LPIPS distance histograms between original and projected images for generated (blue) and real images (orange). Despite the higher image quality of our improved generator, it is much easier to project the generated images into its latent space 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W}. The same projection method was used in all cases.
items.capZh: 图10：生成图像（蓝色）和真实图像（橙色）的原始图像与投影图像之间的LPIPS距离直方图。尽管我们的改进生成器具有更高的图像质量，但将生成的图像投影到其潜在空间𝒲中要容易得多。所有情况均使用相同的投影方法。

items.en: Our projection method differs from previous methods in two ways. First, we add ramped-down noise to the latent code during optimization in order to explore the latent space more comprehensively. Second, we also optimize the stochastic noise inputs of the StyleGAN generator, regularizing them to ensure they do not end up carrying coherent signal. The regularization is based on enforcing the autocorrelation coefficients of the noise maps to match those of unit Gaussian noise over multiple scales. Details of our projection method can be found in Appendix D.
items.zh: 我们的投影方法在两个方面与先前方法不同。首先，我们在优化过程中向潜在代码添加逐渐减小的噪声，以便更全面地探索潜在空间。其次，我们还优化了StyleGAN生成器的随机噪声输入，并对其进行正则化，以确保它们最终不会携带连贯信号。正则化基于强制噪声图的自相关系数与多个尺度上的单位高斯噪声的自相关系数相匹配。我们的投影方法的详细信息可在附录D中找到。

items.en: Detection of manipulated or generated images is a very important task. At present, classifier-based methods can quite reliably detect generated images, regardless of their exact origin [29, 45, 40, 51, 41]. However, given the rapid pace of progress in generative methods, this may not be a lasting situation. Besides general detection of fake images, we may also consider a more limited form of the problem: being able to attribute a fake image to its specific source [2]. With StyleGAN, this amounts to checking if there exists a 𝐰∈𝒲𝐰𝒲{\bf w}\in\mathcal{W} that re-synthesis the image in question.
items.zh: 检测被操纵或生成的图像是一项非常重要的任务。目前，基于分类器的方法可以相当可靠地检测生成的图像，无论其确切来源如何[29, 45, 40, 51, 41]。然而，鉴于生成方法的快速进步，这种情况可能不会持久。除了对伪造图像的一般检测外，我们还可以考虑该问题的一种更有限的形式：能够将伪造图像归因于其特定来源[2]。对于StyleGAN，这相当于检查是否存在一个𝐰∈𝒲可以重新合成所讨论的图像。

items.en: We measure how well the projection succeeds by computing the LPIPS [50] distance between original and re-synthesized image as DLPIPS​[𝒙,g​(g~−1​(𝒙))]subscript𝐷LPIPS𝒙𝑔superscript~𝑔1𝒙D_{\mathrm{LPIPS}}[\boldsymbol{x},g(\tilde{g}^{-1}(\boldsymbol{x}))], where 𝒙𝒙\boldsymbol{x} is the image being analyzed and g~−1superscript~𝑔1\tilde{g}^{-1} denotes the approximate projection operation. Figure 10 shows histograms of these distances for LSUN Car and FFHQ datasets using the original StyleGAN and StyleGAN2, and Figure 9 shows example projections. The images generated using StyleGAN2 can be projected into 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W} so well that they can be almost unambiguously attributed to the generating network. However, with the original StyleGAN, even though it should technically be possible to find a matching latent code, it appears that the mapping from 𝒲𝒲\mathcal{W} to images is too complex for this to succeed reliably in practice. We find it encouraging that StyleGAN2 makes source attribution easier even though the image quality has improved significantly.
items.zh: 我们通过计算原始图像和重新合成图像之间的LPIPS[50]距离来衡量投影的成功程度，即D_LPIPS[𝒙, g(g̃⁻¹(𝒙))]，其中𝒙是被分析的图像，g̃⁻¹表示近似投影操作。图10显示了使用原始StyleGAN和StyleGAN2在LSUN Car和FFHQ数据集上的这些距离直方图，图9显示了示例投影。使用StyleGAN2生成的图像可以投影到𝒲中，以至于它们几乎可以明确地归因于生成网络。然而，使用原始StyleGAN时，尽管技术上应该可以找到匹配的潜在代码，但从𝒲到图像的映射似乎过于复杂，以至于在实践中无法可靠地成功。我们感到鼓舞的是，尽管图像质量显著提高，但StyleGAN2使源归因更容易。

items.en: We have identified and fixed several image quality issues in StyleGAN, improving the quality further and considerably advancing the state of the art in several datasets. In some cases the improvements are more clearly seen in motion, as demonstrated in the accompanying video. Appendix A includes further examples of results obtainable using our method. Despite the improved quality, StyleGAN2 makes it easier to attribute a generated image to its source.
items.zh: 我们已经识别并修复了StyleGAN中的几个图像质量问题，进一步提高了质量，并在多个数据集上显著推进了最先进水平。在某些情况下，改进在动态中更为明显，如随附视频所示。附录A包括使用我们的方法可获得的结果的更多示例。尽管质量有所提高，但StyleGAN2使得将生成的图像归因于其来源更加容易。

items.en: Training performance has also improved. At 10242superscript102421024^{2} resolution, the original StyleGAN (config a in Table 1) trains at 37 images per second on NVIDIA DGX-1 with 8 Tesla V100 GPUs, while our config e trains 40% faster at 61 img/s. Most of the speedup comes from simplified dataflow due to weight demodulation, lazy regularization, and code optimizations. StyleGAN2 (config f, larger networks) trains at 31 img/s, and is thus only slightly more expensive to train than original StyleGAN. Its total training time was 9 days for FFHQ and 13 days for LSUN Car.
items.zh: 训练性能也有所提高。在1024²分辨率下，原始StyleGAN（表1中的配置a）在配备8个Tesla V100 GPU的NVIDIA DGX-1上以每秒37张图像的速度训练，而我们的配置e训练速度提高了40%，达到61 img/s。大部分加速来自由于权重解调、惰性正则化和代码优化而简化的数据流。StyleGAN2（配置f，更大的网络）以31 img/s的速度训练，因此训练成本仅略高于原始StyleGAN。其总训练时间为FFHQ 9天，LSUN Car 13天。

items.en: The entire project, including all exploration, consumed 132 MWh of electricity, of which 0.68 MWh went into training the final FFHQ model. In total, we used about 51 single-GPU years of computation (Volta class GPU). A more detailed discussion is available in Appendix F.
items.zh: 整个项目（包括所有探索）消耗了132 MWh电力，其中0.68 MWh用于训练最终的FFHQ模型。总共，我们使用了大约51个单GPU年（Volta级GPU）的计算量。更详细的讨论见附录F。

items.en: In the future, it could be fruitful to study further improvements to the path length regularization, e.g., by replacing the pixel-space L2subscript𝐿2L_{2} distance with a data-driven feature-space metric. Considering the practical deployment of GANs, we feel that it will be important to find new ways to reduce the training data requirements. This is especially crucial in applications where it is infeasible to acquire tens of thousands of training samples, and with datasets that include a lot of intrinsic variation.
items.zh: 未来，研究路径长度正则化的进一步改进可能富有成效，例如，用数据驱动的特征空间度量替换像素空间L₂距离。考虑到GAN的实际部署，我们认为找到减少训练数据需求的新方法将非常重要。这在获取数万个训练样本不可行的应用中尤其关键，并且在包含大量内在变化的数据集中也是如此。

items.en: We thank Ming-Yu Liu for an early review, Timo Viitanen for help with the public release, David Luebke for in-depth discussions and helpful comments, and Tero Kuosmanen for technical support with the compute infrastructure.
items.zh: 我们感谢Ming-Yu Liu的早期审阅，感谢Timo Viitanen在公开发布方面的帮助，感谢David Luebke的深入讨论和有益评论，以及感谢Tero Kuosmanen在计算基础设施方面的技术支持。
